title: lupinus fruticosus
intro: Lupinus fruticosus, also known as the shrub lupine, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lupinus fruticosus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential remedy for cardiovascular diseases and other conditions. Lupinus fruticosus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although its preparation and dosage should be carefully monitored due to its potential toxicity.
